name: libproxychains4
title: libproxychains4
description:
runtime shared library for proxychains-ng
Proxychains is a UNIX program, that hooks network-related libc functions
in dynamically linked programs via a preloaded DLL (dlsym(), LD_PRELOAD)
and redirects the connections through SOCKS4a/5 or HTTP proxies.
It supports TCP only (no UDP/ICMP etc).
.
This project, proxychains-ng, is the continuation of the unmaintained
proxychains project (known as proxychains package in Debian).
.
This package provides the runtime shared library used by proxychains-ng
program.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libproxychains4 because runtime shared library for proxychains-ng.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libproxychains4 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libproxychains4 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libproxychains4 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
